title: kentsislab/proteomegenerator3 pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

sequence_type.errorMessage: sequence_type must be one of: long_read, short_read, fusion

filetype.errorMessage: filetype must be one of: bam, rc_file, tsv

filepath.errorMessage: filepath must be provided and cannot contain spaces
